ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Categorization of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "event_impact" REAL /* Impact score of the event */,
  "p_decile" TEXT /* Probability decile range for the event */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number of events in the decile range */,
  "total_number" INTEGER /* Total number of events considered */,
  "event_rate" REAL /* Event rate for the decile range */,
  "cum_rate" REAL /* Cumulative event rate up to the current decile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the event */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probability_distribution" (
  "dist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability distribution */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "distribution_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the probability distribution */,
  "distribution_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the probability distribution */,
  "distribution_type" TEXT /* Type of distribution */,
  "decile_start" REAL /* Start of the decile range */,
  "decile_end" REAL /* End of the decile range */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability associated with the decile range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the distribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the distribution */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the distribution */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probability_distribution_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event rate */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "rate_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event rate */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Event rate for the event */,
  "cumulative_rate" REAL /* Cumulative event rate up to the current event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rate */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the rate */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rates_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being simulated */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "simulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the simulation */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the simulation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the simulation */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_simulations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being analyzed in the scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the scenario */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scenario was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scenario */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the scenario */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_scenarios_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
